fullcite: Test User (2024). A long summary test case for verifying truncation and expansion logic.
summary: This is a very long summary designed to exceed the three hundred character threshold. It contains a lot of repetitive information and filler text just to ensure that the logic for truncating the summary and showing the ellipsis button is correctly triggered in the user interface. We want to make sure that the summary is properly cut off at three hundred characters and that the expand button appears as expected, allowing the user to view the full text when clicked. This test case is essential for quality assurance and verification of the recently implemented feature in the ZhengMing search application.
fulltext: Full text for long summary test.
markup: Markup text for long summary test.
